main_question: What exactly is new relative to Science/Nature/Nat Commun subsidence-exposure papers?
minimal_experiment: Lock the claim to observability bias and exposure censoring rather than subsidence mapping.
nature_level_gate: No direct same-claim collision; novelty stated as product-observability bias benchmark.

main_question: Which open products are observable where and when?
minimal_experiment: Build a product-region-time manifest for LiCSAR, Japan LiCSBAS, Iran InSAR, GHSL, WorldCover, NGL.
nature_level_gate: Every source has version, license, DOI/URL, spatial/temporal coverage, and known missingness.
current_local_status: Partial; registry and benchmark v0.1 exist.

main_question: Where does open InSAR fail or become unusable?
minimal_experiment: For each region, compute valid-pixel, coherence, temporal-density, failure masks at thresholds 0.2/0.3/0.4.
nature_level_gate: Failure mask is reproducible, threshold-sensitive, and stored as source data.
current_local_status: Partial; LiCSAR coherence and binomial models exist.

main_question: What is the best available no-token subsidence/deformation benchmark?
minimal_experiment: Standardize VLM sign, units, and projection for delta VLM, Japan LiCSBAS, Iran InSAR, DWR/Central Valley if used.
nature_level_gate: Every benchmark has unit/sign audit, uncertainty note, and independent-anchor status.
current_local_status: Partial; Japan/Iran downloaded, sign audits incomplete.

main_question: How much population/built-up/infrastructure lies in strong-deformation and unobservable cells?
minimal_experiment: Run equal-area or polygon area-weighted overlay for GHSL population, GHSL built-up, OSM roads/rail, irrigation/cropland.
nature_level_gate: Exposure estimate is not center-sampling only; uncertainty from resolution and alignment is quantified.
current_local_status: Partial; VLM-grid GHSL closure exists for Po/Chao/Brantas.

main_question: Is observability failure systematically related to strong subsidence after controls?
minimal_experiment: Fit spatial-blocked hierarchical/binomial models with strong motion, land cover, exposure, region, product, and time-sampling terms.
nature_level_gate: Positive signal survives land-cover/exposure controls, spatial block bootstrap, and leave-one-region-out tests.

main_question: How much does naive visible-only analysis underestimate exposure?
minimal_experiment: Compare visible-only exposure with counterfactual complete-coverage exposure using risk_underestimation_factor.
nature_level_gate: At least one lead region shows policy-relevant exposure underestimation with confidence intervals.

main_question: Does the bias framework transfer across product lineages and regions?
minimal_experiment: Train on deltas and test on Japan/Iran; leave-one-region-out; product-lineage stratification.
nature_level_gate: Model predicts direction/magnitude of observability failure outside the training region or exposes systematic domain limits.

main_question: Is the observed bias just land cover or water/wetland effects?
minimal_experiment: Stratify by WorldCover, cropland/irrigation, wetland/water, built-up, vegetation, and drought/groundwater proxies.
nature_level_gate: Effect is either robust after controls or explicitly reframed as product-land-cover censoring.

main_question: Can reviewers break the result with reasonable choices?
minimal_experiment: Test coherence thresholds, AOI buffers, temporal windows, VLM thresholds 3/5/10 mm yr-1, block sizes, and nodata/sign conventions.
nature_level_gate: Main conclusions survive prespecified sensitivity grid or failures are transparently scoped.
current_local_status: Partial; some bootstrap and threshold sensitivity exists.

main_question: Can the paper tell a Nature-level story in 5-6 figures?
minimal_experiment: Build main figures, extended data, and figure source tables from reproducible scripts.
nature_level_gate: Each figure panel has source data, uncertainty, and a one-sentence conclusion.

main_question: Can the data product be reviewed and reused?
minimal_experiment: Prepare README, data dictionary, manifest, code release, Zenodo/Dryad/ESSD-ready package.
nature_level_gate: Every central claim maps to a public file and reproducible script.
